action_set_definitions.name: get_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current values for soil moisture, ambient temperature, remaining water in the tank, valve status, and total system runtime.

action_set_definitions.name: set_valve_state
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the irrigation valve to either 'open' or 'closed'.

open.description: True to open the valve, False to close it.

action_set_definitions.name: skip_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation clock by a specific number of minutes. Use this to wait for moisture levels to change.

state_description.soil_moisture_percent: Current moisture level in the soil as a percentage (0-100).
state_description.ambient_temperature_celsius: The air temperature inside the greenhouse.
state_description.water_tank_liters: The volume of water remaining in the supply tank.
state_description.valve_is_open: The current status of the irrigation valve (true for open, false for closed).
state_description.system_runtime_minutes: Total elapsed time of the simulation in minutes.
